name: library-ops-governance
description: Governance, Codex control-plane, quality, evaluation, and commit gates for Library Ops.

scripts.skills:lint: bash scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh bash -lc 'find .agents/skills -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name SKILL.md -type f -print | sort | while IFS= read -r file; do npx --yes @swarmclawai/agent-skills-lint@0.1.0 lint "$file" --flavor codex || exit 1; done'
scripts.graph:build: mkdir -p reports/validation/logs && uvx --from code-review-graph code-review-graph build 2>&1 | tee reports/validation/logs/code-review-graph-build.log
scripts.graph:status: mkdir -p reports/validation/logs && uvx --from code-review-graph code-review-graph status 2>&1 | tee reports/validation/logs/code-review-graph-status.log
scripts.graph:review: mkdir -p reports/validation/logs && { uvx --from code-review-graph code-review-graph build && uvx --from code-review-graph code-review-graph status; } 2>&1 | tee reports/validation/logs/code-review-graph-review.log
scripts.policy:check: conftest test .codex/config.toml --policy policy --namespace library_ops.codex && conftest test .github/workflows/*.yml --policy policy --namespace library_ops.github_actions
scripts.security:scan: gitleaks detect --source . --redact && uvx --from semgrep semgrep scan --config .semgrep.yml && uv run bandit -c pyproject.toml -r src && uv run pip-audit --progress-spinner off && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.python:complexity: bash scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh uv run ruff check --select C901 --config 'lint.mccabe.max-complexity = 6' src
scripts.python:lint: bash scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh bash -lc 'uv run ruff format --check . && uv run ruff check . && npm run python:complexity && npm run docstrings:lint'
scripts.checks:precommit: bash scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh bash -lc 'npm run python:lint && npm run markdownlint && npm run skills:lint && npm run skills:audit && npm run taskmaster:validate'
scripts.checks:prepush: bash scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh bash -lc 'npm run commitlint:range && npm run checks:precommit'
scripts.checks:quality: bash scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh bash -lc 'uv run pyright && uv run python manage.py check && uv run python manage.py makemigrations --check --dry-run && PYTHONPATH=src uv run lint-imports && uv run pytest'
scripts.docs:bootstrap: npm run docs:style && npm run docs:spell && npm run docs:inclusive && npm run docs:links && npm run docstrings:coverage && npm run eval:ci && npm run deps:tree
scripts.checks:ci:docs: bash scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh bash -lc 'npm run checks:precommit && npm run docs:bootstrap'
scripts.checks:ci: bash scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh bash -lc 'npm run checks:quality && npm run checks:ci:docs'
scripts.checks:governance: bash scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh bash -lc 'npm run skills:lint && npm run skills:audit && npm run docs:quality && npm run docstrings:coverage && npm run docstrings:lint && npm run eval:ci && npm run deps:tree && npm run workflow:lint && npm run policy:check && npm run release:check && npm run taskmaster:validate'
scripts.checks:python: bash scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh bash -lc 'npm run python:lint && uv run python manage.py check && npm run django:migrations:check && PYTHONPATH=src uv run lint-imports && uv run pyright && uv run pytest -q'
scripts.verify:core: npm run checks:governance && npm run checks:python
scripts.verify:all: npm run checks:governance && npm run security:scan && npm run checks:python
scripts.release:check: bash -lc 'out=$(uv run semantic-release version --no-commit --no-tag --no-push --no-vcs-release --changelog 2>&1); status=$?; printf "%s\n" "$out"; if [ $status -eq 0 ] || printf "%s" "$out" | rg -q "isn'"'"'t in any release groups"; then exit 0; fi; exit $status'
scripts.docs:inclusive: alex AGENTS.md README.md llms.txt .codex/agents docs specs src evals
scripts.docs:quality:offline: npm run markdownlint && npm run docs:style && npm run docs:spell && npm run docs:inclusive
scripts.docs:quality: npm run docs:quality:offline && npm run docs:links
scripts.eval:smoke: scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh npx --yes promptfoo@0.121.15 eval -c promptfooconfig.yaml --no-cache --no-table --output reports/validation/promptfoo-smoke.json
scripts.eval:ci: npm run eval:validate && npm run eval:smoke
scripts.eval:provider:local: scripts/codex-runtime-env.sh env OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:11434 npx --yes promptfoo@0.121.15 eval -j 1 -c evals/release/control-plane-provider.yaml --no-cache --no-table --output reports/validation/promptfoo-provider-local.json
